title: 1x M2 medium (1L)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ce25i","text":"M2 medium for co-culturing Cyanobacteria, such as S. elongtatus, together with heterotrophic bacteria","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":50,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c8q2c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d5sdd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5e8ev","text":"Slighly modified from: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"70t01","text":"Weiss, Taylor L., Eric J. Ducat. \"A synthetic,  light-driven consortium of cyanobacteria and heterotrophic bacteria  enables stable polyhydroxybutyrate production.\" Metabolic engineering 44 (2017): 236-245.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":186,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 1 ml 1000x Na 2 CO 3 (20 mg · L -1 )
1000x concentration: H 3 BO 3 (2.86 g · L -1 ) MnCl 2 · 4 H 2 O (1.81 g · L -1 ) ZnSO 4 · 7 H 2 O (0.222 g · L -1 ) Na 2 MoO 4 · 2 H 2 O (0.390 g · L -1 ) Co(NO 3 ) 2 · 6 H 2 O (0.049 g · L -1 )
Fill up to 1 l with MilliQ-water
The medium has to be autoclaved afterwards
Always work under sterile conditions. Recipe for 1L 1x M2 medium
Add 1ml of 1000x Fe(III) ammonium citrate (6 mg · L -1 )
Add 200 µl of 5000x CuSO 4 · 5 H 2 O (395 ng · mL -1 )
creator: Sarah Seyffert
